'''mazogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meadow|meadow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meadow|meadow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mazogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzegeth|mæzegeth]] || [[word:mæzegej|mæzegej]] || [[word:mæzegesh|mæzegesh]] || [[word:mæzege|mæzege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazozogoth|mazozogoth]] || [[word:mazozogoj|mazozogoj]] || [[word:mazozogosh|mazozogosh]] || [[word:mazozogo|mazozogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazogoth|mazogoth]] || [[word:mazogoj|mazogoj]] || [[word:mazogosh|mazogosh]] || [[word:mazogo|mazogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazofgoth|mazofgoth]] || [[word:mazofgoj|mazofgoj]] || [[word:mazofgosh|mazofgosh]] || [[word:mazofgof|mazofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazogotho|mazogotho]] || [[word:mazogojo|mazogojo]] || [[word:mazogosho|mazogosho]] || [[word:mazogoko|mazogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazogoth|mazogoth]] || [[word:mazogoj|mazogoj]] || [[word:mazogosh|mazogosh]] || [[word:mazogo|mazogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazogothol|mazogothol]] || [[word:mazogojol|mazogojol]] || [[word:mazogoshol|mazogoshol]] || [[word:mazogokol|mazogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazogothotho|mazogothotho]] || [[word:mazogojojo|mazogojojo]] || [[word:mazogoshosho|mazogoshosho]] || [[word:mazogoko|mazogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazogothon|mazogothon]] || [[word:mazogojon|mazogojon]] || [[word:mazogoshon|mazogoshon]] || [[word:mazogokon|mazogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazogothoro|mazogothoro]] || [[word:mazogojoro|mazogojoro]] || [[word:mazogoshoro|mazogoshoro]] || [[word:mazogokoro|mazogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
